name: concise-guide-to-apa-style
description: The APA's official style guide (7th ed.) — formatting academic papers, citing sources, writing without bias, and presenting scholarly work clearly and consistently.
useCase: Paper formatting, in-text citations, reference lists, bias-free writing, scholarly grammar and style.
knownRisks: This is a quick reference for the Concise Guide — it does not replace the full Publication Manual
APA Style is periodically updated — the current edition is the 7th (2020); rules may differ for 6th edition users
Some instructors or institutions may modify APA Style — always follow assignment-specific guidelines
